title: Super Solenoid You can fight without your head
display_title: Super Solenoid You can fight without your head
wikitext:
[]: Super Solenoid= You can fight without your head?             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue May 15, 2007 2:44 am Just now I looked at some screenshots of EoE. When Third Impact was triggered, the Tree of Life was seen to be comprised of Eva-01 and the 9 MP Evas. What I remembered had happened earlier was that in Asuka's fight with the MP Evas, at least two have been totally incapicitated- one had his head blown up and torn into two, all his blood pouring on Eva-02. The second had been cut into two by a large blade thing, the torso thrown to nowhere to be seen. Then how come you still have a total of 9 units to build up the Tree of Life? It has been clearly stated that the super solenoid for the MP Evas are incapable of regenerating, therefore at most you should only get 7 units capable of finishing their mission (among which some had already lost their leg or an arm, or have toothpicks stuck all over his head). Don't tell me the super solenoid can allow one to resurrect like the liquid robot in Terminator 2.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 15, 2007 6:10 am I always wondered this myself, because even Seele states that "(We have) somewhat fewer than planned, it will have to do.", yet there's only 9 to begin with, and we see 9 carry Sho into the skies... Very weird.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 15, 2007 7:39 am they got up, picked up their limbs, and flew up there! :P no, but maybe there was actually Eva's 5-15, but 14 and 15 didnt come out till 3I, so then there are 2 lying dead somwhere wait, nervermind heres a thought perhaps, when Lilith started to rise to the sky, when everybody AT field started collapsing, the MP Eva's werent affected (since they were clones of Angels, and had an Angel Dummy Plug) and they actually used that to their own advantage, and pulled themselves back together?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 15, 2007 8:21 am All the Evas just get back up. You can even see the one without legs flying around during the crucifixion of Unit 01. How can some of them operate with severe degrees of damage? Because their S2 are fueled by a wonderful substance known as narrativium .

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue May 15, 2007 8:22 am If you pay attention, the Harpy with the broken neck actually does regenerate.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue May 15, 2007 8:31 am Hey, but the first MP Eva killed by Asuka has actually be torn into gravy!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 15, 2007 8:32 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: If you pay attention, the Harpy with the broken neck actually does regenerate.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Tue May 15, 2007 10:07 am So why is Sho able to regenerate, but not the Harpy's?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue May 15, 2007 10:09 am TriLink12 wrote: So why is Sho able to regenerate, but not the Harpy's?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 15, 2007 10:14 am nobody has addressed the confusing Seele quote I posted (c'mon, no takers?).

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Tue May 15, 2007 10:45 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: nobody has addressed the confusing Seele quote I posted (c'mon, no takers?).

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 15, 2007 10:51 am Szmitten wrote: I was convinced that somewhere it was said that there were meant to be 15 Evas in total, but #23 states otherwise (13). With the quote in question, I was under the impression (from various subs) that they were talking about the entire set (EVA-01 instead of Lilith etc).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 15, 2007 11:21 am TriLink12 wrote: So why is Sho able to regenerate, but not the Harpy's?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue May 15, 2007 12:47 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: SINCE WHEN?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue May 15, 2007 1:31 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: If I knew how to make an animated gif I would. Pop in EoE and fast-forward to the part where the Harpies get up, the one with it's neck snapped, you know the limp-headed one, actually reconnects it to it's body.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 15, 2007 1:42 pm Reichu wrote: so much as those omnipresent continuity errors --

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Tue May 15, 2007 6:59 pm Guess What people? When you ask shit about MP Evas,. your not really supposed to think about it, because that would be greater consistancy than Anno was capable of in EoE. :p

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue May 15, 2007 9:14 pm Reichu wrote: I wouldn't really chalk the innumerable discrepancies in injury presentation to "regeneration"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 15, 2007 11:18 pm Reichu wrote: By the same token, the first one that's attacked is initially shown with her entire head destroyed, and then, when she reactivates, only the top of the cranium is ruptured (brains hanging out, and such). I wouldn't really chalk the innumerable discrepancies in injury presentation to "regeneration" so much as those omnipresent continuity errors -- i.e., the neck-snapping wasn't "supposed" to be "throw it over your shoulder like a continental soldier"-extreme. If that makes any sense at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed May 16, 2007 5:49 pm ... And Ignored, even though it is a plausible answer.
